voice_install.title: Install Voice Interface
voice_install.ports_hint: STT on port 10300, TTS (Piper) on port 10200
voice_install.autostart_hint: Containers start automatically on every system reboot
voice_install.running: Installation running — incus container + models being set up…

agentlink.title: AgentLink
agentlink.not_configured_hint: Set HH_AGENTLINK_URL so ask_agent can route between agents.

backup.title: System Backup
backup.description: Full backup of database, configs and user workspaces. For catastrophe recovery and server migration.
backup.restore_warning: File: {{file}}. Current state will be auto-saved as rollback. Service will restart after restore.
backup.waiting_restart: Restore applied — waiting for service restart…
backup.restore_done: Restore complete. Please log in again.

tailscale.title: Tailscale
tailscale.install_hint: Installs the Tailscale binary and enables tailscaled. Connect here afterwards with an auth key.
tailscale.authkey_hint: Create an auth key in the Tailscale admin panel:
tailscale.invite_explainer: Generates a one-time auth key (valid 24h) for another server. Requires a Tailscale admin API key configured below.
tailscale.invite_failed: Auth key could not be generated
tailscale.admin_api_key_hint: From the Tailscale admin panel → Settings → Keys → API access tokens.
tailscale.admin_tailnet_hint: '-' uses your own tailnet. Otherwise the tailnet name (e.g. example.com).
tailscale.admin_save_failed: API key was rejected by Tailscale

samba.title: SMB Shares (Samba)
samba.subtitle: Project workspaces as network shares — mountable from Windows/Mac/Linux.
samba.done: Samba running. Enable per-project via the project's settings tab.

bridge.title: Network bridge (br0)
bridge.subtitle: Bridged networking for VMs and containers — same IP range as the host.
bridge.confirm_hint: Setup changes the netplan config and runs `netplan apply` — network may drop for ~10 seconds. SSH sessions might hang but recover.
bridge.done: Bridge set up — VMs/containers now have LAN access.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Integration settings without SSH. The SearXNG URL takes effect immediately; integrations like Mail/Discord/AgentLink require a backend restart.
